Dashboard
TRADING INTELLIGENCE

Nebula

Weekly trading signals powered by Deep Learning LSTM models and macro regime analysis. More information, less noise.

ACCESS DASHBOARD
Status:Live
| Engine: Neural v2.1
FUNCTIONS

Institutional processing

Nebula operates in three layers: prediction, macro filtering, and regulatory compliance. Every signal passes through a multi-stage validation pipeline before reaching your dashboard.

neurology

Neural Projections

LSTM-64 architecture with Conformal Prediction (MAPIE) for calibrated confidence intervals. Weekly predictions with XGBoost meta-validation.

◆ Certainty: 87.3%|Sharpe: 1.84
travel_explore

Macro Regime Filter

Multi-factor analysis: yield curve (German Bund), credit spreads (HY-IG), VIX and interbank liquidity. Regime filtering to avoid adverse markets.

◆ Regime: EXPANSION|VIX: 14.2
verified

Compliance Engine

Automated Spanish 2-month fiscal rule and ESG filters. Protection system that blocks trades if the asset is in a fiscal restriction period.

◆ Status: CLEAR|Blocks: 12
PERFORMANCE

Strategy benchmarks

Backtest results on real market data. V3 strategy performance with portfolio rotation and active macro regime filter.

SHARPE RATIO 1.84 vs 0.95 benchmark
WIN RATE 68% +12% vs buy & hold
MAX DRAWDOWN -12.4% vs -18.7% market
STRATEGY ALPHA +8.6% annualized
EXPECTANCY 2.41 win/loss ratio
TRADES 847 total backtest 12m
EXPOSURE 62% time in market
CALMAR RATIO 2.03 return / drawdown
ARCHITECTURE

Processing pipeline

Each signal goes through a 5-stage pipeline before being presented on the dashboard.

01

Data Ingestion

Alpaca / Tiingo / Yahoo Finance

FRED (macroeconomic)

15+ real-time sources

arrow_forward
02

LSTM Engine

LSTM-64 architecture

Conformal Prediction (MAPIE)

252-session window

arrow_forward
03

Meta-Classifier

XGBoost validator

Macro regime (yield curve, VIX)

Systemic risk filter

arrow_forward
04

Compliance

Spanish 2-month fiscal rule

ESG filters

Restriction management

arrow_forward
05

Signal Output

UP / DOWN / HOLD signal

Dynamic stop loss (ATR)

Dashboard alerts

Transatlantic coverage

Multi-market support with real-time data. From the S&P 500 to the IBEX 35, through European blue chips.
